ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Umbral Invitation Towa' — explicit character name in title. Female figure, dark bodysuit, Demon Realm Race trait, dark magic framing all match Towa's canonical design. Card name is direct evidence per anti-conflation rule criterion (a).

trivia_bullets.text: Towa is a brilliant scientist of the Demon Realm Race and the younger sister of Dabura, the Demon King of the Dragon Ball Z Babidi arc. She created Mira as an artificial warrior and partnered with him to harvest ki by corrupting historical fighters into 'Villainous' versions — fueling the unsealing of the Demon Realm. [WebSearch: Dragon Ball Wiki Mira (Fandom); WebSearch: thegamer.com Mira and Towa cameo explained]

Umbral Invitation Towa (BT4-111, Common, Black) has Dark Over Realm 4: requires at least 4 black cards in the Drop Area to trigger, then sends all Drop Area cards to the Warp to play for free (once per turn). Its [Auto] on play steals up to 1 opposing Battle Card with energy cost 3 or less — a control-theft effect that is unusually powerful for a common-rarity card. [WebSearch: DBZExchange BT4-110/111 combined result]
sources: WebSearch: DBZExchange BT4-110/111 combined WebSearch result

trivia_bullets.text: The card's title 'Umbral Invitation' literalizes Towa's Xenoverse role: she recruits historical villains and corrupted heroes into the Time Breakers' cause, effectively issuing dark invitations across time. The theft [Auto] — stealing an opponent's Battle Card — is a direct mechanical translation of that recruitment-as-corruption motif. [WebSearch: Dragon Ball Wiki Mira (Fandom)]

Umbral Invitation Towa received a Shenron's Chosen stamped promo variant (BT4-111 tournament promo), a prestige foil treatment reserved for cards that performed well in organized play or were selected for event promotion. For a common-rarity card, receiving the Shenron's Chosen designation signals strong competitive utility within its archetype. [WebSearch: gatheringpointgames.co.uk BT4-111 Shenron's Chosen listing]
sources: WebSearch: gatheringpointgames.co.uk BT4-111 Shenron's Chosen promo
